_metadata.notes: 2026 FEDVIP dental and vision premium rates. Dental plans use rating regions (0-9); vision plans vary by location. Average increase: dental 3.35%, vision 0.47%. v2026.2: added premium_change_history 2021-2026.

program_overview.name: Federal Employees Dental and Vision Insurance Program
program_overview.premium_basis: Employees pay pre-tax; annuitants and TRICARE enrollees pay post-tax

premium_change_history._note: Average program-wide premium change by plan year. Source: OPM announcements via FedSmith.com.

2021._note: OPM did not publish a single avg pct for 2021; individual plan changes varied.

dental._note: Dental plans by rating region. Rating regions vary by carrier — check the OPM dental rating region chart for your region.
